name: pbe-address-book
description: PBE Address Book (Book) — a members-only PBE alumni directory.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build:libs && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tools/fake-data/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.seed: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore "npm run seed:run --workspace tools/fake-data"
scripts.verify:gate: npm run check && npm run assert:tokens && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run assert:no-dev-provider && npm run check:bundle-size && npm run test && npm run test:emulator && npm run e2e
